desc:
Cette piece est sombre et enfumee. Des garcons affaires mais neanmoins
obsequieux virevoltent avec aisance parmi les clients assis autour de petites
tables en marbre. Dans un coin, a peine eclaires par une lampe verdatre, quatre
joueurs sans age repetent les sempiternelles parties de l'apres-midi. Au sud,
une grande porte vitree, conduit a la terrasse.
name: Cafe Francais

desc:
Sur cette terasse inondee de soleil des parasols jaunes et rouges protegent les
buveurs prelasses. En contrebas les toits de Paris forment une charmante mer
d'ocre et de rouge... Un serveur vous aborde et vous demande: "Desirez-vous
boire quelque chose ?"... Comment refuser ? Au nord une porte vitree conduit a
l'interieur de ce "French Coffee".
name: Terrasse

desc:
There are no big changes here, but everything seems to constantly shift, warp or
move. While no change in itself is big, every single one adds up and makes a
very noticeable difference.
name: The Hall of Small Changes

desc:
Light does not often reach this place. The only thing you notice is a musty
smell, maybe caused by some strange animal ?
name: Inside a Gigantic Tree

desc:
You are in an owl's nest, in the midst of a gigantic tree. The floor is littered
with mouse bones. Somebody seems to have moved back recently, piles of paper
bearing strange cabalistic marks are neatly stacked in the corners.
name: Owl's nest

desc:
It looks like any other mercenary's hideout. There are various kind of weapons
hanged on the walls, some of them quite antique. On the right corner you notice
a table full of strange liquids and alchemical supplies.
name: Verona's Hideout

desc:
As you crest the Hill, you notice a vast expanse of trees lie before you. The
smell of fresh air tingles your nostrils whilst you hear the birds chirping and
the leaves rustling. The trees are aligned in perfect order and the fruit they
bear looks delicious.
name: Apple's Orchard

desc: Cameron Diaz is standing here looking very cute.
name: La Casa de Kheldur

desc:
The little path now comes to and end, in this huge hall, you are suposed to find
peace and harmony. Some small white stones are to be seen on the ground, showing
the path to the east and in to the brokendoor. Some strange blue stones are
lying here, makeing a strange beautiful light The stones seems to picture a
arrow pointing to the north.
name: Marte's Bed Room

desc:
The first thing you notice when entering this room is the smell, a mixture of
tobacco and stale beer fills the air. The room however, is very clean and well
kept. A highly polished walnut topped bar runs the east side of this room,
behind which a variety of liquors, spirits and wines are stocked. Barrels that
have been turned into makeshift stools are laid out in an orderly fashion in
front of the bar. The wall to the north shows a picture of dogs playing pool and
smoking. Low lighting completes the scene. A sign above the bar reads: 'Dont be
offended if your ask for ID, it means you look young!'
name: The Tavern of Tarnas

desc:
Great, towering walls thrust upwards and together to form the enormous boundries
of this troll cave. Upon the walls crude drawings have been etched into the
walls by way of broken bone and immense pressure. On the ground is a large pile
of shattered skulls, snapped vertabre, and half-rotten hobbit corpses that have
been twisted into crude, humorous shapes. Upon closer inspection of a hobbit
corpse nearest your feet, you can see broken toes and
name: Noisy Grotto Pub and Grill

desc:
As you walk into this cave a quick shiver goes up your spine. Cold air flows
throught this cave making the hairs on the back of your neck stand. Searching
deeper into the cave a pair of glowing red eyes can be seen. Moving closer, bats
start to fly about, and rats scurry around the floor, as you become more
frightened. The walls are covered with a thick goo among them and the smell of
rotten corpses floats about the cave. Although all these features surround you.
A bright light appears as Omega the Invincible appears infront of you. Instantly
your heart becomes lighter and your hairs settle, as you feel warmth inside this
cave.
name: Omega's Secret Cave

desc:
This might be a corner if the internet weren't round. This might be a sight to
see if there were no sound.
name: Tavares' tipsy turvey

desc:
From this elaborate command post, all that happens on Arda below can be seen,
evaluated, tested and stored. Cabinets and drawers line the room, overflowing
with scrolls and tomes of bygone deeds and historical events. In the middle of
the room stands a table, upon which several journals and writing utensils lie.
Huge windows line the east side of the room, where a large telescope can be seen
looking down upon the silken tights of a fair maiden. Someone is standing here
(idle).
name: Thank God It's Friday's!

desc:
Like silken tights on the legs of a fair maiden, flames engulf you from all
sides, burning the skin from your cooking flesh. The pain you suffer is nothing
compared to the piercing sound that makes your teeth loosen from your jaw and
make your ear-drums immediately vaporize. All around you see small pieces of
charred bones, no doubt from uninvited visitors who didn't pay enough respect to
the one ruling here. Two huge thrones made out of black marble stands next to a
small, round table with delicate inlays of gold and jade. Some small silver cups
filled with a clear liquid stand on top of the table.
name: Purgatory

desc:
This small but sturdy treehouse is perched roughly twenty feet above the ground.
At this height, often times light breezes blow past, ruffling one's hair and
carrying the scent of flowers from below. Books and trinkets are laying upon a
set of shelves carved out of the tree's trunk. This home's single solid wall
branches off the supporting tree. A cuddly white stuffed toy eagle sways
comfortably within a hammock attached to two treebranches. Sitting against one
wall is a large wooden chest, a few blanket corners poking out. The rest of this
home is quite open, leading out onto a round terrace with a simple handrail. The
entire structure is made of wood and enclosed in a large beech on the outskirts
of a lush forest. The anterior view offers a wonderous view of a white sand
beach and crystal blue waters.
name: A Breezy Treehouse

desc:
This island is one of the most breathtaking places on earth. Tucked away in the
middle of nowhere, it is packed with an amazing variety of flora and fauna in an
equally impressive array of landscapes - cool mountain valleys, sultry mangrove
forests, and massive volcanoes draped with lush forests and topped with desolate
craters. Wonderful, sandy beaches at the western part of the island with huge
palms invite visitors to relax. A huge and colourful hammock is tied to two
palms close to the beach providing a shady refuge for tired visitors right
beside the refreshing small stream meeting the sea after a few meters.
name: Temptation Island

desc:
Lots of books are on the ground, opened and underlined. When you examine the
surroundings, you find that they are not ONLY on the ground, they are
everywhere: in the bookshelf, desk, chair, and over a table. Also, you notice a
tapestry hanging from the wall in front of bookshelf wall, with a beautiful
embroidered image on it. Also, in the center wall, there is a window, with a
picture resting against it. A soft and comfortable red carpet invites you to
walk without shoes. A small magical waterfall is in the center of the room,
inviting you to drink from it.
name: Irikan's Cleric Study

desc:
The peak of this mountain proudly points directly skyward. The view extends so
far in each direction, that on cloudless days even the faint edge of the distant
Mortal Lands is visible far to the east. Away to the west, a slight darkening
suggests the Void beyond the rim of Arda. The air is cold and crisp here even
when lands below enjoy the warmth of Spring. The faint scent of pinetrees
reaches here from the treeline, a ways below. The silence is far deeper than the
melodies spun by the Elves in their fair halls afar to the east. The presence of
Eru Iluvatar, the One and the Creator, surrounds this place like a great
blanket, magnified by the perfect silence.
name: A Solitary Mountain

desc:
The walls in this chamber are made of white marble, being circular in shape,
alike to those of a tower. Several, wide pillars of stone travel high above,
where they greet and support the ceiling. A spiral, silver staircase traces
close to the pillars, until the stairs disappear beyond sight above, where a
blazing light enters the room. The staircase is held aloft by several, thin rods
that are also silver, and each one is reflecting a great amount of the light
that shines in from above. The lower portion of this chamber lies in shadow
though, where there is only a single beam of light that reaches down and upon a
sculpture of Nimloth the White Tree of Numenor. The sculpture of the tree stands
in the center of the chamber, near the base of the stairs. Between the pillars
are several paintings, each one was painted directly onto the walls. Though this
chamber is only a small space within the Halls of Doom, this is where Almarian,
loyal servant of Namo, can be found after her tasks are complete for the day,
painting all of Numenorean's sorrow upon the walls.
name: Vestige of Numenor

desc:
This golden abode is the home of Namo, one of the Feanturi. Large pillars rise
towards the bejewelled ceiling, covered with ancient paintings depicting Arda
during its early days. Eru and Manwe can easily be recognized, as well as
Yavanna and the golden trees, Telperion and Laurelin. The cold floor has been
engraved with strange patterns, giving this room an eerie feeling. Fabulous
wooden benches has been put along the walls, each bench in front of a pillar,
making it easy for you to sit down and watch the beautiful paintings. But then,
who would want to spend time here? The Halls of the Doomed, the Halls of the
Dead. A place every mortal will have to pass through, strong or weak, beautiful
or ugly. The mere thought makes you dizzy.
name: The Halls of Doom
